memoryLane.name: Phase 14: Animation Performance Profiling & Optimization
memoryLane.focus: ANIMATION PERFORMANCE — Profiling, GPU acceleration, frame rate optimization
scope: Profile animated components using Chrome DevTools Performance panel
Identify jank, layout thrashing, or paint overhead in animations
Verify GPU acceleration (transform, opacity, will-change strategies)
Optimize animation frame rates (target: 60fps on all devices)
Profile hero ScrollReveal animations for smooth scrolling
Profile category button interactions for instant responsiveness
Measure before/after performance gains with metrics

success_criteria.gpu_acceleration: All animated elements using GPU transforms

memoryLane.blockers: None — Phase 14 starts after Phase 13 completes
